summary: Frontend testing completed for SkopeOS Kitchen Management Platform expansion. All 6 new pages (Admin Portal, Client Dashboard, Inventory Management, Food Cost Calculator, Settings, Customer Engagement) load correctly with proper UI components. Sidebar navigation works for all pages.

minor.issue: Returns 502 from preview URL - expected behavior per review request
Returns 502 from preview URL - expected behavior per review request
Returns 502 from preview URL - expected behavior per review request

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Loading chart data...' and 0 values when API returns 502 - no static fallback data implemented

issues: Net Profit Margin shows 'Above target' warning even when value is 0% (edge case when no data)

action_items: Consider adding static fallback data for Admin Portal when API fails (like other pages)
Fix Net Profit Margin warning logic to not show 'Above target' when value is 0%
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Portal relies on API data while other pages (Inventory, Food Cost, Settings, Customers, Client Dashboard) use static demo data - inconsistent approach
Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' appears during navigation - minor Recharts sizing issue
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing (APIs return 502 as expected)

test_credentials: None required - Demo mode with static data
seed_data_creation: None - All data is hardcoded in page components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new SkopeOS pages tested successfully. Admin Portal shows empty data due to 502 API errors but UI structure is correct. Other pages use static demo data and work perfectly. Sidebar navigation with data-testid attributes works correctly.

details: Page loads with title 'Admin Portal'
Brand selector dropdown present (data-testid='brand-selector')
Stats cards visible: Net Revenue, Total Orders, COGS %, Net Profit Margin
Revenue & COGS Trend chart section visible (shows 'Loading chart data...')
P&L Summary section visible
Period selector (7/30/90 days) present
ISSUE: All values show 0 due to API 502 errors - no static fallback
Page loads with 12 inventory items
Stats cards: Total Items (12), Low Stock (9), Critical (6), Stock Value (₹84.0K)
Stock status badges: CRITICAL, LOW, HIGH visible
Search and filter functionality present
Brand filter dropdown works
Inventory table with all columns visible
Page loads with brand selector (The Burger Co default)
Stats: Total Recipes (5), Avg Food Cost (41.2%), High Cost Items (4), Target COGS (35%)
High Food Cost Items section with 4 items showing variance percentages
Cost by Category bar chart visible
Optimized Items section visible
Integrations section with Google My Business and CRM Integration cards
Both integrations show 'Connected' status
Toggle switches: Loyalty Program, Push Notifications, Auto Reorder, Real-time Data Sync
Loyalty Program settings with points configuration
Data & Privacy section with backup info
8 customer cards with tier badges (PLATINUM, GOLD, SILVER, BRONZE)
Stats: Total Customers (8), Avg Rating (4.4★), Active Points (21,340), Lifetime Value (₹213K)
Tier Distribution pie chart visible
Recent Feedback section with customer reviews
Search and tier filter functionality present
Welcome message for TechCorp Cafeteria with GOLD Member badge
Stats: Loyalty Points (12,500), Total Orders (156), Total Spent (₹485K), Credit Available (₹375K)
Monthly Spending bar chart visible
Order Categories donut chart visible
Recent Orders section with order cards
Place New Order button present (data-testid='place-order-btn')
Admin Portal nav link works (data-testid='nav-admin-portal')
Inventory nav link works (data-testid='nav-inventory')
Food Cost nav link works (data-testid='nav-food-cost')
Customers nav link works (data-testid='nav-customers')
Settings nav link works (data-testid='nav-settings')
All navigation transitions work correctly

mocked_data_note: ALL PAGE DATA IS MOCKED except Admin Portal which tries to fetch from API. Inventory, Food Cost, Settings, Customers, Client Dashboard use static hardcoded demo data.
